title: ResearchOutput
description: A research output (publication, dataset reference, thesis, etc.) as exposed by the VU Amsterdam Pure REST web service. Properties reflect the Pure API v5.34.3 OpenAPI definition.

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object; prefer the UUID when present.

uuid.description: UUID, the primary identity of the entity.

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification.

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification.

portalUrl.description: URL of the content on the Pure Portal.

version.description: Optimistic-locking version token used to guard against conflicting updates.

title.description: Formatted title of the research output.

subTitle.description: Formatted sub-title of the research output.

type.description: Classification reference for the research output type.

category.description: Classification reference for the research output category.

peerReview.description: Whether the research output is peer reviewed.

internationalPeerReview.description: Whether the research output is internationally peer reviewed.

language.description: Classification reference for the language of the output.

totalNumberOfContributors.description: Total number of authors from author collaborations.

managingOrganization.description: Reference to the managing organizational unit.

submissionYear.description: The submission year of the research output.

publicationStatuses.description: The research output's statuses and the dates they were reached.

electronicVersions.description: Electronic versions of this research output.

identifiers.description: Identifiers (DOI, ISBN, etc.) related to the research output.

keywordGroups.description: Groups of keywords associated with the research output.

abstract.description: Formatted localized abstract of the research output.

typeDiscriminator.description: Discriminator identifying the concrete research output subtype.
